chapter_title.en: Chapter 132 – The pairing between the two seven (circuits)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/42)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/42)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّمَا يُكْرَهُ أَنْ يَجْمَعَ الرَّجُلُ بَيْنَ الْأُسْبُوعَيْنِ وَ الطَّوَافَيْنِ فِي الْفَرِيضَةِ فَأَمَّا فِي النَّافِلَةِ فَلَا بَأْسَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad in Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Abdullah Bin Muskan, from Zurara who said,
‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘But rather, it is disliked if the man were to gather between the two sevens and the two Tawaafs regarding the Obligatory. But, as for the optional, so there is no problem’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from Muhammad ibn Sinan from ‘ Abd Allah ibn Muskan from Zurarah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is Makruh (detestable) to perform two Tawaf of obligatory nature together; but in the case of optional Tawaf it is not harmful.’ ”
